hero.headline: Corporate Padel Events in Vienna — effortless, premium, and fun
hero.subheadline: We organize everything: courts, match flow, hosting, and a memorable tournament format your team will actually talk about on Monday.
hero.trustLine: Ideal for team-building, client events, and company celebrations (beginner-friendly formats available).

heroImage.alt: Corporate padel tournament atmosphere in Vienna

socialProof.headline: Why teams choose Sun Set Padel

cards.title: Beginner-friendly by design
cards.text: We structure matches so mixed skill levels still feel fair and fun.

cards.title: Run-of-show included
cards.text: We handle schedule, scoring, rotations, and timekeeping.

cards.title: Premium content
cards.text: Photo & video moments included — perfect for internal comms and LinkedIn.

cards.title: Vienna network
cards.text: We work with trusted padel venues and partners across the city.

photoSection.headline: What it looks like
photoSection.subheadline: Add 6–10 strong photos here: tournament moments, team groups, podium, branded details, food/drinks, smiling beginners.

items.title: Gameplay & tournament flow
items.text: A structured format (round-robin / ladder / mini-league) with clear timing, rotations, and scoring — hosted by our team.

items.title: Hospitality & add-ons
items.text: Optional drinks, snacks, catering, and a relaxed social atmosphere — tailored to your budget and timing.

items.title: Space & experience
items.text: We select the best venue for your group size and season, and create a clear run-of-show from welcome to awards.

packages.headline: Corporate Packages
packages.subheadline: Choose a package, then customize with add-ons. All packages can be adapted to your group size.

packageCards.name: Team Play
packageCards.idealFor: Team-building with a stronger event feel

packageCards.name: Premium
packageCards.idealFor: Client events, celebrations, high-impact internal comms
highlights: Branded details (welcome sign / simple court branding)

packages.note: Need more than 12 players? We can scale formats and courts — request a custom plan.

interactiveBuilder.headline: Build your event (quick choices)
interactiveBuilder.subheadline: Pick your goals and add-ons — we’ll send the best-fit concept and price range.

addons.name: DJ / Music concept
addons.detail: Set the vibe for awards and networking.

addons.name: Catering / snacks
addons.detail: Light bites to full catering depending on venue.

addons.name: Photo + video upgrade
addons.detail: More edited highlights, reels clips, aftermovie.

caseStudy.subheadline: Replace this with your real corporate case as soon as you have it.
bullets: Outcome: high engagement across mixed skill levels

items.a: No. We can run a beginner-friendly format with short rules briefing and structured rotations.
Yes. We scale courts and formats depending on venue availability and your event goals.
Court time + tournament flow + organization. Add-ons (photo/video, catering, prizes) depend on package and venue.

items.q: How fast can we confirm a date?
items.a: If you share preferred dates and group size, we usually confirm a plan quickly based on venue availability.

requestSection.headline: Request your corporate offer
requestSection.subheadline: Tell us your date, group size, and goals. We’ll reply with a concept and pricing options.
